description: Represents a multi-region parameter group that can be applied to clusters across multiple regions in Amazon MemoryDB.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the multi-region parameter group.

MultiRegionParameterGroupName.description: The name of the multi-region parameter group.

Family.description: The name of the parameter group family that this multi-region parameter group is compatible with.

Description.description: A description of the multi-region parameter group.
